signals.headline: Trump Announces US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz After Failed Iran Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz After Failed Iran Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump ordered US Navy ships to begin blockading Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz starting April 13, 2026, following failed weekend negotiations where Iran refused to abandon its nuclear program.[1][2]

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2%, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecast | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

signals.headline: Solana ecosystem hack**: Drift Protocol lost $285M on April 1, 2026 (North Korean actors blamed), causing TVL drop from
signals.raw: Solana ecosystem hack**: Drift Protocol lost $285M on April 1, 2026 (North Korean actors blamed), causing TVL drop from $9B to $5.5-6B and $110M SOL exchange inflows signaling sell pressure; price hovers $78-82.[2][6]
